title: agrostis cinna
intro: Agrostis cinna, also known as quaking grass or quaking grass cinna, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Agrostis cinna has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Agrostis cinna is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
